tour.title: Welcome to Slopsmith
tour.content: This is your library — every PSARC and sloppak we found in your DLC folder. Let's take a quick spin through the controls.

tour.title: Search
tour.content: Filter the library by title, artist, or album. Matches as you type.

tour.title: Sort
tour.content: Sort by recent, artist, title, year, or tuning. "Recent" surfaces whatever you've played or added lately.

tour.title: Format filter
tour.content: Narrow the list by source format — PSARC (Rocksmith CDLC), sloppak (open format), or folder imports.

tour.title: Grid or tree view
tour.content: Toggle between grid (album-art cards) and tree (artist → album) views. Tree view shows Expand All / Collapse All buttons next to it.

tour.title: Advanced filters
tour.content: Filter by arrangement (Lead/Rhythm/Bass), stems availability, lyrics, or tuning. Active filters appear as chips below the search box.

tour.title: Play a song
tour.content: Click any card to start playing. The ★ marks it as a favorite — your favorites get their own screen in the navbar.

tour.title: That's the tour
tour.content: The floating ? button (bottom-right) brings this back any time, plus any plugin tours relevant to the current screen.
